creator: m@mikaelsimonsson.com
text:
% clang-tidy38  foo.cc -- -I ../ -std=c++1z
Assertion failed: (Name.isIdentifier() && "Name is not a simple identifier"), function getName, file /usr/ports/devel/llvm38/work/llvm-3.8.0.src/tools/clang/include/clang/AST/Decl.h, line 170.
Abort trap (core dumped)

clang-tidy37 works perfectly.

% freebsd-version
10.2-RELEASE-p11

% uname -a
FreeBSD aria 10.2-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p9 #0: Thu Jan 14 01:32:46 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
